title: Road Trip Planner
desc: A free offline tool for road trip planner calculations. Works in your browser.

title: Airport Code Lookup
desc: Look up IATA airport codes worldwide. Search by code, city, or airport name. Free airport code finder.

title: Country Calling Code Lookup
desc: Look up international country calling codes. Find dialing codes and formats. Free country code directory.

title: Travel Currency Converter
desc: Quick currency converter for travelers. Convert USD, EUR, GBP, JPY and more. Free offline currency calculator with preset rates.

title: Distance Calculator
desc: Calculate distance between cities. GPS coordinates distance. Free distance calculator.

title: Distance & Fuel Estimator
desc: Calculate fuel cost and emissions for any trip distance. Compare vehicles by MPG. Free trip fuel calculator and carbon footprint estimator.

title: Driving Side by Country
desc: Check which side of the road countries drive on. Left or right hand traffic guide. Free driving side reference.

title: Flight Baggage Calculator
desc: Calculate airline baggage fees by weight and dimensions. Compare carry-on and checked bag fees. Free airline baggage fee calculator.

title: Flight Time Calculator
desc: Calculate flight time between airports with time zones. See arrival time and flight duration. Free flight time calculator.

title: Fuel Economy Converter
desc: Convert MPG to L/100km. Compare fuel economy. Free fuel economy converter.

title: Jet Lag Calculator
desc: Calculate jet lag recovery time and adjustment schedule. Time zone shift, light exposure timing. Free jet lag calculator.

title: Mileage Calculator
desc: Track and calculate mileage for reimbursement, taxes, or expenses. Log trips with distance and rate. Free mileage tracker calculator.

title: Mileage Tracker
desc: Track mileage for tax deductions. Log trips, calculate reimbursements. IRS rate. Free mileage tracker.

title: Packing List Generator
desc: Generate custom packing list for any trip. Beach, business, hiking, international. Free packing list generator.

title: Passport Validity Checker
desc: Check passport validity for international travel. Six-month rule checker. Free passport expiration calculator.

title: Plug Socket Reference
desc: Find plug socket types and voltage by country. Know which adapter you need for international travel. Free plug socket reference guide.

title: Road Toll Calculator
desc: Estimate road trip toll costs across US highways. Calculate toll fees by state and vehicle type. Free toll road cost calculator.

title: Time Zone Converter
desc: Convert time between world time zones. Free international time zone converter.

title: Tipping Guide by Country
desc: Find tipping customs and percentages for 50+ countries. Know when, where, and how much to tip while traveling. Free international tipping guide.

title: Travel Budget Calculator
desc: Plan your trip budget. Flights, hotels, food, activities. Daily budget tracker. Free travel budget calculator.

title: Travel Budget Splitter
desc: Split travel costs among group members. Track who paid what and calculate balances. Free trip expense splitter.

title: Travel Itinerary Template
desc: Generate a travel itinerary template. Plan day-by-day activities and schedule. Free travel itinerary maker.

title: Travel Visa Requirement Checker
desc: Check tourist visa requirements between countries. Free visa checker for international travelers. Find visa-free destinations.

title: Trip Budget Calculator
desc: Plan and budget for trips. Estimate flights, hotels, food, activities, and daily costs. Free trip budget calculator for travelers.

title: Voltage by Country
desc: Reference of voltage and frequency standards by country. 110V vs 220V guide for international travelers. Free voltage reference.
